Note:
[8-bit] Global game state
0x01 = Game initial startup
0x02 = Game startup license screen
0x04 = Title menu screen
0x06 = Load game screen
0x0c = Level select screen
0x0e = Level start
0x0f = In game
0x10 = Pause
0x11 = Level end/ranking screen
0x12 = Shop options screen
0x13 = "Save game" option screen
0x14 = Game Over screen (Continue)
0x17 = Tutorial help screen
0x1a = Multiplayer waiting screen

[8-bit] Game state substate (see 0x0770)
=== In game (0x0f) ===
0x02 = Default state
0x03 = Trial lost

[8-bit] Player status
0x2 = Standing still
0x3 = Moving
0x4 = Fast moving (hover)
0x6 = Charging for a big shot
0x7 = Firing a quick shot or start of charge

[8-bit] Fire action substate (if 0x077c = 7)
0x00 = Not firing
0x01 = Shot firing
0x02 = Shot fired
0x03 = Power shot fired
[8-bit] Weapon charging frame counter (0x00 -> 0x3c for first time shots, 0x00 -> 0x38 for consecutive shots)

[8-bit] Tools slot 1
0x00 = Empty
0x01 = Bomb (red)
0x02 = Invincible (red)
0x03 = Decoy (blue)
0x04 = Uber-Decoy (red)
0x07 = Health Lv. 1 (red)
0x08 = Health Lv. 2 (blue)
0x09 = Health Lv. 3 (green)
0x0a = Health Maximum (black)
0x0b = Armor Scroll (black, +2 HP)
0x0c = Attack Scroll (black, +2% Attack)
0x0d = Force Scroll (black, +4% Force)
0x2c = Reflect Shot 1 (red)
0x2d = Reflect Shot 2 (blue)
0x2e = Reflect Shot 3 (green)
0x2f = X-Ray Shot 1 (red)
0x30 = X-Ray Shot 2 (blue)
0x31 = X-Ray Shot 3 (green)
0x32 = Doom Shot 1 (red)
0x33 = Doom Shot 2 (blue)
0x34 = Doom Shot 3 (green).
0x35 = Leech Shot 1 (red)
0x36 = Leech Shot 2 (blue)
0x37 = Leech Shot 3 (green)
0x3b = Magnet Shot 1 (red)
0x3c = Magnet Shot 2 (blue)
0x3d = Magnet Shot 3 (green)
0x3e = 3 Way Shot 1 (red)
0x3f = 3 Way Shot 2 (blue)
0x40 = 3 Way Shot 3 (green)
0x41 = Double Shot 1 (red)
0x42 = Double Shot 2 (blue)
0x43 = Double Shot 3 (green)
0x44 = Drain Shot 1 (red)
0x45 = Drain Shot 2 (blue)
0x46 = Drain Shot 3 (green)
0x50 = Bomb Level 2 (blue)
0x51 = Bomb Level 3 (green)
0x52 = Invincible 1 (blue)
0x53 = Invincible 2 (green)
0x54 = Medicine (red)

[8-bit] Relics slot 1
0x00 = Empty
0x10 = Reanimator
0x11 = Luck Ring (red)
0x12 = Luck Gauntlet (blue)
0x13 = Luck Amulet (green)
0x14 = Armor Ring (red)
0x15 = Armor Gauntlet (blue)
0x16 = Armor Amulet (green)
0x18 = Attack Ring (red)
0x19 = Attack Gauntlet (blue)
0x1a = Attack Amulet (green)
0x1c = Force Ring (red)
0x1d = Force Gauntlet (blue)
0x1e = Force Amulet (green)
[16-bit] Hits taken this stage (0 = no-hit bonus)

[8-bit] Direction facing
0x00 = Up
0x01 = Up right
0x02 = Right
0x03 = Down right
0x04 = Down
0x05 = Down left
0x06 = Left
0x07 = Left up

[8-bit] Character selected
0x00 = Frank
0x01 = Drac
0x02 = Wolfie
0x03 = Mina
0x04 = Drew

[8-bit] Current level
0x00 = Cemetery Level 1
0x01 = Cemetery Level 2
0x02 = Cemetery Trial
0x03 = Cemetery Shadow
0x04 = Village Level 1
0x05 = Village Level 2
0x06 = Village Trial
0x07 = Village Shadow
0x08 = Garden Level 1
0x09 = Garden Level 2
0x0a = Garden Trial
0x0b = Pumpkin Boss
0x0c = Atlantis Level 1
0x0d = Atlantis Level 2
0x0e = Atlantis Trial
0x0f = Atlantis Shadow
0x10 = Temple Level 1
0x11 = Temple Level 2
0x12 = Temple Trial
0x13 = Dragon Boss
0x14 = Desert Level 1
0x15 = Desert Level 2
0x16 = Desert Trial
0x17 = Desert Shadow
0x18 = Clouds Level 1
0x19 = Clouds Level 2
0x1a = Clouds Trial
0x1b = Clouds Shadow
0x1c = Factory Level 1
0x1d = Factory Level 2
0x1e = Factory Trial
0x1f = Factory Shadow
0x20 = Castle Level 1
0x21 = Castle Level 2
0x22 = Castle Level 3
0x23 = Castle Level 4
0x24 = Seargeant Smash
[8-bit] Number of objects (pumpkins, enemies) loaded in extended viewport

[8-bit] Invincibility cheat enabled
0x02 = Not enabled
0x03 = Enabled
[16-bit] Level timer in frames (1/60 of a second)

[8-bit] Cemetery Level 1 ranking (ladder 1)
0x00 = Bronze (score < 500 or skipped)
0x01 = Bronze (score >= 500)
0x02 = Bronze (score >= 1000)
0x03 = Bronze (score >= 2000)
0x04 = Silver (score >= 4000)
0x05 = Gold (score >= 8000)
0x06 = Crystal (score >= 16000)

[8-bit] Cemetery Trial ranking (ladder 2)
0x00 = Bronze (score < 25 or skipped)
0x03 = Bronze (score >= 25)
0x04 = Silver (score >= 50)
0x05 = Gold (score >= 100)
0x06 = Crystal (score >= 200)

[8-bit] Cemetery Shadow ranking (ladder 3)
0x00 = Bronze (score < 200 or skipped)
0x01 = Bronze (score >= 200)
0x02 = Bronze (score >= 400)
0x03 = Bronze (score >= 800)
0x04 = Silver (score >= 1000)
0x05 = Gold (score >= 2000)
0x06 = Crystal (score >= 4000)

[8-bit] Village Trial ranking (ladder 4)
0x00 = Bronze (score < 250 or skipped)
0x02 = Bronze (score >= 250)
0x03 = Bronze (score >= 500)
0x04 = Silver (score >= 1000)
0x05 = Gold (score >= 2000)
0x06 = Crystal (score >= 4000)

[8-bit] Atlantis Level 1 ranking (ladder 5)
0x00 = Bronze (score < 2000 or skipped)
0x01 = Bronze (score >= 2000)
0x02 = Bronze (score >= 3000)
0x03 = Bronze (score >= 4000)
0x04 = Silver (score >= 6000)
0x05 = Gold (score >= 16000)
0x06 = Crystal (score >= 24000)

[8-bit] Clouds Level 1 ranking (ladder 6)
0x00 = Bronze (score < 2000 or skipped)
0x01 = Bronze (score >= 2000)
0x02 = Bronze (score >= 4000)
0x03 = Bronze (score >= 8000)
0x04 = Silver (score >= 16000)
0x05 = Gold (score >= 32000)
0x06 = Crystal (score >= 64000)

[8-bit] Factory Trial ranking (ladder 7)
0x00 = Bronze (score < 2000 or skipped)
0x01 = Bronze (score >= 2000)
0x02 = Bronze (score >= 4000)
0x03 = Bronze (score >= 8000)
0x04 = Silver (score >= 10000)
0x05 = Gold (score >= 20000)
0x06 = Crystal (score >= 40000)

[8-bit][Bitflags] Buttons pressed
Bit0 = A
Bit1 = B
Bit2 = Select
Bit3 = Start
Bit4 = Right
Bit5 = Left
Bit6 = Up
Bit7 = Down

[8-bit][Bitflags] Shoulder buttons pressed
Bit0 = Right shoulder button pressed
Bit1 = Left shoulder button pressed
(other bits are always 1)

[8-bit] Language selected
0x0 = English
0x1 = Francais
0x2 = Espanol
0x3 = Deutsch
0x4 = Italiano

[8-bit] Amount of characters unlocked
0x03 = Default (Wolfie, Drac, Frank available)
0x04 = Mina unlocked
0x05 = Drew unlocked
[8-bit] Displayed time in pause dialog: Minutes (tens)
[8-bit] Displayed time in pause dialog: Minutes (ones)
[8-bit] Displayed time in pause dialog: Seconds (tens)
[8-bit] Displayed time in pause dialog: Seconds (ones)

[8-bit] Character in Character Select screen
0x00 = Frank
0x01 = Drac
0x02 = Wolfie
0x03 = Mina
0x04 = Drew
